title: Fresh Textures × Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Textures compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
**Fresh Textures × Fresh Animations** — this is an add-on for the Fresh Textures resource pack that adds support for the Fresh Animations resource pack for mobs from the resource pack. 

### It is recommended to use the resource pack as shown in the photo below:

![31231](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dc35cd3af791ed6b5a419a0115e6e8fa5c58d92.png)

## ⚙️ Compatibility
It is recommended to use these mods for full resource pack compatibility, but it is not required.
*   [\[EMF\] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
*   [\[ETF\] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
